tasks.description:
Run the full `pnpm test` suite to confirm all changes are correct and no regressions were introduced.

## Commands to run

```bash
# Run full test suite across client + server
pnpm test -- --run

# Or run just the affected test files for faster feedback:
pnpm vitest run apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-chat-session-relay.test.ts
pnpm vitest run apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions.test.ts
```

## Expected results

### Tests that must pass (existing, no behavioral change)

**Client relay tests** (`use-chat-session-relay.test.ts`):
- `calls sendMessageRelay when relay enabled`
- `calls sendMessage when relay disabled`
- `adds user message optimistically on relay submit`
- `sets status to streaming on relay submit`
- `handles sendMessageRelay errors`
- `processes relay_message events from EventSource`
- `relay EventSource is NOT torn down when isStreaming changes`
- `relay EventSource listens for stream_ready and registers it`
- `relay EventSource URL includes clientId`
- `legacy path does NOT create EventSource when relay enabled`
- `legacy path creates EventSource without clientId when relay disabled`
- All staleness detector tests

**Server sessions tests** (`sessions.test.ts`):
- All existing GET /messages success-path tests (200, 304 ETag path)
- All other route tests in sessions.test.ts

### New tests that must pass (added in Tasks 2.1 and 2.2)

- `does not call invalidateQueries on sync_update while streaming`
- `calls invalidateQueries on sync_update when status is idle`
- `returns 500 when getMessageHistory throws`

## If any test fails

1. Run the failing test file in isolation to see the full error
2. Check that the code changes from Phase 1 match the exact before/after shown in the spec
3. Verify `statusRef` is being read correctly (not `isStreaming` closure value)
4. Verify the `next` parameter is added to the Express route handler signature

## Acceptance Criteria

- `pnpm test -- --run` exits with code 0
- No test regressions in any package
- All 3 new tests pass
- TypeScript compilation passes: `pnpm typecheck`
tasks.activeForm: Running full test suite to verify no regressions
